_comment: (a) clean variant-A-vs-B EFFICIENCY re-run: /charness:retro before vs after the plan_retro_run.py planner extraction (commit 167cad5c; pre = 167cad5c~1 = a7e49790). Both arms run the same /charness:retro prompt, so find-skills auto-routing is constant and the delta is the planner-extraction effect (routing contamination cancels). retro ships no outcome-assertions.json, so the Outcome-grade section reports 'skipped — no assertion set'; this run proves the EFFICIENCY axis, not the outcome wiring. n=2/arm. Real claude -p spend (user-authorized).
name: retro-variant-ab
